title: Giles & Posner EK4698GSPP Doughnut Maker – Non-Stick Cooking Plates, Mini Donut Machine for 3 Donuts, Easy Clean Snack Dessert Making for Kids, Vegan, Breakfast Doughnuts, Sorbet Pastel Purple, 500 W
features: Enjoy irresistible doughnuts in no time with the Giles & Posner Sorbet Mini Doughnut Maker, an ideal way to share the fun together at home.
Measuring 13 x 16.5 x 8.5cm, this compact treat maker makes up to three doughnuts at a time, great for fun cooking and individual portion sizes.
This 550W non-stick doughnut maker features non stick cooking plates which make for an easy clean and is designed to be user-friendly.
Get creative to make yummy breakfast and vegan doughnuts, top with ice cream, fruit, chocolate or cereal for an irresistible treat.
Environmentally conscious, the instruction manual can be found by simply going to our Giles & Posner website.
